finding.summary: Track capture is entirely silent (silence_fraction 1.0) with peak and RMS at the measurement floor; every reported level/loudness statistic is diluted by silence and cannot support any tonal or dynamic conclusion.
finding.probable_cause: audio.silence_fraction is 1.0 alongside audio.sample_peak_db -120.0 and audio.rms_db -120.0 indicate no measurable program material in the capture window; integrated LUFS and LRA values are not interpretable when the buffer is fully silent.
finding.confidence_reason: Confidence is capped at low because audio.silence_fraction is 1.000.

evidence_refs.description: Silence fraction is 1.0 — capture is fully silent.
Sample peak at -120.0 dBFS confirms no signal content.
RMS at -120.0 dBFS confirms no signal content.

proposal.reason: Capture is silent; no safe single-track move is supported by this evidence (silence_fraction ≥ 0.75 forces operation none).
